basic_details.job_title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 54 Professor, Associate Professor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Teaching Faculty (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 67 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh/DRNB as per NMC TEQ 2025 Regulations, Valid registration with State Medical Council/NMC
qualification.details: Professor: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh/DRNB as per NMC TEQ 2025 Regulations, Valid registration with State Medical Council/NMC. Associate Professor: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh/DRNB as per NMC TEQ 2025 Regulations, Valid registration with State Medical Council/NMC. Assistant Professor: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh/DRNB as per NMC TEQ 2025 Regulations, Valid registration with State Medical Council/NMC.

selection_process: Document Verification Screening Test (if applicable) Interview Merit List

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for ESIC Teaching Faculty posts is scheduled to be held on 01 July 2026 and 02 July 2026. Candidates should report between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on these dates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by ESIC?
faq.answer: ESIC has announced a total of 54 vacancies for the Teaching Faculty positions, including Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with MD/MS/DNB/DM/MCh/DRNB as per NMC TEQ 2025 Regulations and a valid registration with the State Medical Council/NMC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Teaching Faculty posts is 67 years. There is no mention of age relaxation for any category.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview dates with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the ESIC Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 1,46,638/- per month for Assistant Professors to Rs. 2,56,671/- per month for Professors.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 500/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the ESIC Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the ESIC Walk-in Interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC, Chennai, Tamil Nadu. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Screening Test (if applicable), and an Interview, followed by the preparation of a Merit List.
